title: Overwatch 2 Beginner Guide — Win Your First Match
intro: Complex game, simple strategy. Here is what actually matters in your first 10 hours of Overwatch 2.
steps: Pick one faction and stick with it — do not keep switching
Focus economy first: resources then production then military
Build at least 2 scouts in the first 5 minutes
Set a timer for 7 minutes — that is when most AI opponents attack
Watch your replays — you will spot mistakes you missed while playing
conclusion: The meta changes but fundamentals stay the same.

title: Starting Your First City in BG3 — A Layout That Works
intro: New BG3 players always build too fast. Here is a starting layout that keeps your city alive.
steps: Place roads parallel to wind direction — this affects pollution spread
Zone residential areas at least 10 tiles from industrial zones
Build your water pump UPSTREAM of sewage outlets
Place fire and police stations BEFORE your population hits 500
Leave 2 empty tiles between buildings for future road expansions
conclusion: Good luck. Practice makes perfect.

title: Fast Leveling Route in Fortnite — Skip the Grind

steps: Start at Shadow Pass — mobs here give bonus XP on first clear
Only equip gear with +XP modifiers even if defense is worse
Skip all cutscenes and dialogue you have already seen
Use AoE abilities to pull 3-5 mobs at once
At level 40 immediately move to the next zone — do not overlevel
conclusion: Took me 200+ hours to learn this. You are welcome.

title: Improve Your Aim in Tarkov — Settings Pros Use
intro: Your aim is not the problem. Your settings probably are. Here is what competitive Tarkov players change first.
steps: Disable mouse acceleration in Windows Mouse Settings
In Tarkov set mouse sensitivity to 400-800 DPI native
Turn OFF V-Sync — it adds input lag even on good monitors
Set shadows to low, textures to medium, anti-aliasing off for max FPS
Practice in training mode for 10 min before every session
conclusion: These tips got me from bronze to gold. Stick with it.

steps: Place roads parallel to wind direction — this affects pollution spread
Zone residential areas at least 10 tiles from industrial zones
Build your water pump UPSTREAM of sewage outlets
Place fire and police stations BEFORE your population hits 500
Leave 2 empty tiles between buildings for future road expansions
conclusion: Good luck. Practice makes perfect.

title: Improve Your Aim in Apex Legends — Settings Pros Use
intro: Your aim is not the problem. Your settings probably are. Here is what competitive Apex Legends players change first.
steps: Disable mouse acceleration in Windows Mouse Settings
In Apex Legends set mouse sensitivity to 400-800 DPI native
Turn OFF V-Sync — it adds input lag even on good monitors
Set shadows to low, textures to medium, anti-aliasing off for max FPS
Practice in training mode for 10 min before every session
conclusion: These tips got me from bronze to gold. Stick with it.

title: PUBG Beginner Guide — Win Your First Match
intro: Complex game, simple strategy. Here is what actually matters in your first 10 hours of PUBG.
steps: Pick one faction and stick with it — do not keep switching
Focus economy first: resources then production then military
Build at least 2 scouts in the first 5 minutes
Set a timer for 7 minutes — that is when most AI opponents attack
Watch your replays — you will spot mistakes you missed while playing
conclusion: The meta changes but fundamentals stay the same.
